first_time.title: Check Eligibility
first_time.description: Ensure you meet the basic requirements to vote in India.

checklistItems.label: I am 18 years or older as of Jan 1

first_time.title: Register to Vote
first_time.description: Apply for your Voter ID card using Form 6.

checklistItems.label: Keep age and address proof ready
Submit Form 6 on NVSP or Voter Helpline App

registered.title: Verify Name in Roll
registered.description: Ensure your name exists in the current electoral roll.

checklistItems.label: Search name on electoral search portal

relocated.title: Update Address
relocated.description: Transfer your vote to your new constituency or update address within same constituency.

checklistItems.label: Get address proof for new location
Submit Form 8 for shifting of residence
